name: diagIsChannelConnected
title: diagIsChannelConnected
description: Checks if a channel is already in state Connected.
The channel the function refers to is set with the last call of diagSetTarget.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

return: 1 if channel is connected, 0 if channel is not connected, otherwise error code.
